强化学习/世界模型.title: Actionable World Representation
强化学习/世界模型.summary: Inspired by the emergent behaviors in large language models that generalized human intelligence, the research community is pursuing similar emergent capabilities within world models, with a emphasis on modeling the physical world. Within the scope of physical world model, objects are the fundamental
强化学习/世界模型.summary_zh: 受大语言模型中涌现的通用人类智能行为的启发，研究界正在世界模型中寻求类似的涌现能力，重点在于对物理世界的建模。在物理世界模型的范畴内，物体是基本单元。本文提出一种可行动的世界表征方法，旨在让智能体不仅能够感知世界，还能基于表征采取行动。创新点在于将世界模型与行动策略紧密结合，使表征具有行动导向性，从而提升在复杂物理环境中的决策能力。主要贡献是提出了一种新的表征学习框架，能够更有效地支持下游任务如规划和控制。

可解释AI.title: Learning Quantifiable Visual Explanations Without Ground-Truth
可解释AI.title_zh: 无真实标签的可量化视觉解释学习
可解释AI.summary: Explainable AI (XAI) techniques are increasingly important for the validation and responsible use of modern deep learning models, but are difficult to evaluate due to the lack of good ground-truth to compare against. We propose a framework that serves as a quantifiable metric for the quality of XAI
可解释AI.summary_zh: 可解释AI技术对现代深度学习模型的验证和负责任使用至关重要，但由于缺乏可比较的真实标签，评估这些技术非常困难。本文提出了一个框架，可作为XAI质量的量化指标。创新点在于无需真实标签即可学习可量化的视觉解释，通过设计自监督或弱监督方法，使解释结果具有可度量性。主要贡献是提供了一种评估XAI方法的客观标准，推动了可解释性研究的实用化。

概率编程/贝叶斯方法.title: AI4BayesCode: From Natural Language Descriptions to Validated Modular Stateful Bayesian Samplers
概率编程/贝叶斯方法.title_zh: AI4BayesCode：从自然语言描述到经过验证的模块化有状态贝叶斯采样器
概率编程/贝叶斯方法.summary: Coding and computation remain major bottlenecks in Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) workflows, especially as modern sampling algorithms have become increasingly complex and existing probabilistic programming systems remain limited in model support, extensibility, and composability. We introduce \text
概率编程/贝叶斯方法.summary_zh: 编码和计算仍然是马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛工作流的主要瓶颈，尤其是现代采样算法日益复杂，而现有概率编程系统在模型支持、可扩展性和可组合性方面仍有限制。本文介绍了AI4BayesCode，一个从自然语言描述自动生成经过验证的模块化有状态贝叶斯采样器的框架。创新点在于利用大语言模型理解用户意图，并生成正确、模块化的采样代码，同时提供验证机制确保可靠性。主要贡献是大幅降低了贝叶斯建模的编程门槛，提高了MCMC方法的可用性和可靠性。

信息检索/代码检索.title: Improving BM25 Code Retrieval Under Fixed Generic Tokenization: Adaptive q-Log Odds as a Drop-In BM25 Fix
信息检索/代码检索.title_zh: 在固定通用分词下改进BM25代码检索：自适应q-log Odds作为BM25的即插即用修复
信息检索/代码检索.summary: In retrieval-augmented coding, failures often begin when the relevant file is absent from the retrieved context. Under frozen generic tokenization, where a BM25 index has been built by a search system whose analyzer the practitioner does not control, this failure is routine: BM25's logarithmic RSJ-o
信息检索/代码检索.summary_zh: 在检索增强编码中，失败往往始于相关文件未出现在检索上下文中。在固定的通用分词下，BM25索引由从业者无法控制的分析器构建，这种失败是常见的：BM25的对数RSJ项（即log-odds）在处理代码时表现不佳。本文提出自适应q-log Odds作为BM25的即插即用修复方法。创新点在于调整BM25的评分函数，使其更好地适应代码检索场景，无需重新索引。主要贡献是显著提升了在固定分词条件下代码检索的准确率，改善了检索增强编码系统的性能。

机器人/软体机器人.title: ManiSoft: Towards Vision-Language Manipulation for Soft Continuum Robotics
机器人/软体机器人.title_zh: ManiSoft：面向软体连续体机器人的视觉-语言操作
机器人/软体机器人.summary: Most existing vision-language manipulation research targets rigid robotic arms, whose fixed morphology limits adaptability in cluttered or confined spaces. Soft robotic arms offer an appealing alternative due to their deformability, but confront challenges such as unreliable proprioception and distr
机器人/软体机器人.summary_zh: 现有的视觉-语言操作研究大多针对刚性机械臂，其固定形态限制了在杂乱或狭窄空间中的适应性。软体机械臂因其可变形性而成为一种有吸引力的替代方案，但面临本体感知不可靠和运动学分布复杂等挑战。本文提出ManiSoft，一个面向软体连续体机器人的视觉-语言操作框架。创新点在于结合视觉和语言指令，实现对软体机器人的灵活控制，并处理其特有的变形和感知不确定性。主要贡献是首次将视觉-语言模型应用于软体机器人操作，扩展了机器人操作的范围。

多模态学习.title: Lance: Unified Multimodal Modeling by Multi-Task Synergy
多模态学习.title_zh: Lance：通过多任务协同实现统一多模态建模
多模态学习.summary: We present Lance, a lightweight native unified model supporting multimodal understanding, generation, and editing for both images and videos. Rather than relying on model capacity scaling or text-image-dominant designs, Lance explores a practical paradigm for unified multimodal modeling via collaboration among multiple tasks. It leverages a shared backbone with task-specific adapters, enabling efficient multi-task learning without catastrophic forgetting. Experiments show Lance achieves competitive performance across diverse benchmarks with significantly fewer parameters than existing unified models.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 本文提出Lance，一个轻量级的原生统一模型，支持图像和视频的多模态理解、生成与编辑。不同于依赖模型容量扩展或文本-图像主导的设计，Lance通过多任务协同探索统一多模态建模的实用范式。它采用共享骨干网络与任务特定适配器，实现高效的多任务学习，避免灾难性遗忘。实验表明，Lance在多个基准上以显著更少的参数取得了与现有统一模型相竞争的性能。

多模态学习.title: Query-Conditioned Knowledge Alignment for Reliable Cross-System Medical Reasoning
多模态学习.title_zh: 查询条件化的知识对齐：实现可靠的跨系统医学推理
多模态学习.summary: Cross-domain knowledge alignment is essential for integrating heterogeneous medical systems, yet existing approaches typically treat entity alignment as a static matching problem, ignoring query context and cross-system asymmetry. This limitation is particularly critical in integrative medical settings where the same query may require different alignments depending on the clinical context. This paper proposes a query-conditioned knowledge alignment framework that dynamically adjusts alignment based on the input query's semantics and the specific medical systems involved. The method uses a transformer-based encoder to capture query context and a gating mechanism to weigh alignments from different sources. Experiments on real-world medical datasets demonstrate significant improvements in alignment accuracy and downstream reasoning performance, especially in handling asymmetric and context-dependent alignments.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 本文针对跨系统医学知识对齐中忽略查询上下文和系统不对称性的问题，提出查询条件化的知识对齐框架。该方法利用基于Transformer的编码器捕获查询语义，并通过门控机制动态调整不同来源的对齐权重。在真实医学数据集上的实验表明，该方法在对齐准确率和下游推理性能上显著优于静态对齐方法，尤其擅长处理非对称和上下文相关的对齐场景。核心创新在于将对齐从静态匹配升级为查询驱动的动态过程，提升了跨系统医学推理的可靠性。

多模态学习.title: Vision-OPD: Learning to See Fine Details for Multimodal LLMs via On-Policy Self-Distillation
多模态学习.title_zh: Vision-OPD：通过在线策略自蒸馏学习多模态LLM中的精细细节
多模态学习.summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) still struggle with fine-grained visual understanding, where answers often depend on small but decisive evidence in the full image. We observe a regional-to-global perception gap: the same MLLM answers fine-grained questions more accurately when conditioned o
多模态学习.summary_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在细粒度视觉理解方面仍存在困难，答案往往依赖于全图中微小但决定性的证据。我们观察到一个区域到全局的感知差距：当基于局部裁剪区域时，同一MLLM回答细粒度问题的准确率更高，而基于全图时准确率下降。本文提出Vision-OPD（On-Policy Self-Distillation），一种在线策略自蒸馏方法，旨在弥合这一差距。该方法的核心创新在于：训练过程中，模型同时以全图和局部区域为输入，并利用局部区域产生的更精确预测作为软标签来指导全图的预测。通过在线策略自蒸馏，模型学会在全图中聚焦关键细节。主要贡献：显著提升了MLLM在细粒度视觉任务（如物体计数、属性识别）上的性能，无需额外标注或模型结构修改，计算开销小。

多模态学习.title: CATA: Continual Machine Unlearning via Conflict-Averse Task Arithmetic
多模态学习.title_zh: CATA：通过冲突规避任务算术的持续机器遗忘
多模态学习.summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable ability in aligning visual and textual representations, enabling a wide range of multimodal applications. However, their large-scale training data inevitably raises concerns about privacy, copyright, and undesirable content, creating a strong need for machine unlearning. This paper proposes CATA, a continual machine unlearning method for VLMs that leverages conflict-averse task arithmetic to remove specific data influences without retraining. The key innovation is a gradient-based conflict detection mechanism that identifies and resolves parameter interference between forgetting and retention tasks, enabling efficient sequential unlearning requests. Experiments on multiple VLMs demonstrate that CATA achieves superior forgetting effectiveness while preserving model utility, outperforming existing baselines.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 视觉语言模型在视觉-文本对齐方面表现出色，但其大规模训练数据引发隐私、版权和不良内容等问题，亟需机器遗忘技术。本文提出CATA，一种基于冲突规避任务算术的持续机器遗忘方法，无需重训练即可移除特定数据影响。核心创新在于梯度冲突检测机制，识别并解决遗忘与保留任务间的参数干扰，支持高效的顺序遗忘请求。在多个VLM上的实验表明，CATA在保持模型效用的同时实现了优越的遗忘效果，超越现有基线。

多模态学习.title: Semantic Generative Tuning for Unified Multimodal Models
多模态学习.title_zh: 面向统一多模态模型的语义生成调优
多模态学习.summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) strive to consolidate visual understanding and visual generation within a single architecture. However, prevailing training paradigms independently optimize understanding via sparse text signals and generation through dense pixel objectives. Such a decoupled strategy...
多模态学习.summary_zh: 统一多模态模型（UMM）旨在单一架构中整合视觉理解与视觉生成。然而，当前的训练范式通过稀疏文本信号独立优化理解，通过密集像素目标独立优化生成。这种解耦策略导致两个任务之间的语义鸿沟，限制了模型的协同能力。本文提出语义生成调优（Semantic Generative Tuning, SGT），通过引入语义对齐的生成目标，使理解和生成共享语义空间。创新点在于设计了一种联合训练框架，利用文本语义引导生成过程，同时增强视觉特征的语义一致性。主要贡献包括：提出SGT范式，显著提升UMM在图像描述、视觉问答和图像生成等任务上的性能；实验证明语义对齐能有效弥合理解与生成之间的差距，为多模态模型的发展提供了新思路。

大语言模型/LLM.title: DBES: A Systematic Benchmark and Metric Suite for Evaluating Expert Specialization in Large-Scale MoEs
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: DBES：评估大规模MoE中专家的系统化基准与度量套件
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Expert specialization in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models remains poorly understood, with traditional evaluations conflating architectural load-balancing with functional specialization. We introduce DBES, a comprehensive diagnostic framework combining a multi-domain benchmark with five theoretically grounded metrics to isolate and quantify expert specialization. Our analysis reveals that specialization is highly non-uniform across layers and domains, and that routing strategies significantly impact specialization patterns. DBES provides actionable insights for MoE design.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 混合专家模型（MoE）中的专家专业化现象尚未被充分理解，传统评估方法混淆了架构负载均衡与功能专业化。本文提出DBES，一个综合诊断框架，结合多领域基准与五个理论驱动的度量指标，以分离并量化专家专业化。分析显示，专业化在不同层和领域间高度非均匀，且路由策略显著影响专业化模式。DBES为MoE设计提供了可操作的见解。

大语言模型/LLM.title: STT-Arena: A More Realistic Environment for Tool-Using with Spatio-Temporal Dynamics
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: STT-Arena：一个具有时空动态的更真实的工具使用环境
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Large language models (LLMs) deployed in real-world agentic applications must be capable of replanning and adapting when mid-task disruptions invalidate their prior decisions. Existing dynamic benchmarks primarily measure whether LLMs can detect temporal changes in a timely manner, leaving the compl
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 部署在真实世界智能体应用中的大型语言模型（LLM）必须能够在任务中断使其先前决策失效时重新规划和适应。现有动态基准主要衡量LLM能否及时检测时间变化，但忽略了空间动态。本文提出STT-Arena，一个更真实的工具使用环境，同时引入时空动态。创新点在于：1）同时模拟空间障碍和时间限制；2）要求LLM在动态变化中重新规划工具使用策略。贡献：提供了评估LLM在复杂动态环境中适应性的基准，揭示了现有模型在时空联合推理中的不足。

大语言模型/LLM.title: LongMINT: Evaluating Memory under Multi-Target Interference in Long-Horizon Agent Systems
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: LongMINT：评估长周期智能体系统中多目标干扰下的记忆能力
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Real-world agents operate over long and evolving horizons, where information is repeatedly updated and may interfere across memories, requiring accurate recall and aggregated reasoning over multiple pieces of information. However, existing benchmarks focus on static, independent recall and fail to c
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 真实世界智能体在长周期中运行，信息不断更新并可能产生记忆干扰，需要准确回忆和聚合推理。现有基准聚焦于静态独立回忆。本文提出LongMINT基准，评估多目标干扰下的记忆能力。创新点：1）设计多目标干扰场景，模拟信息更新和冲突；2）要求模型在多个记忆片段间进行聚合推理。贡献：揭示了当前LLM在长时间跨度、多信息干扰下的记忆退化问题，为开发更鲁棒的智能体记忆系统提供了测试平台。

大语言模型/LLM.title: AMR-SD: Asymmetric Meta-Reflective Self-Distillation for Token-Level Credit Assignment
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: AMR-SD：用于Token级信用分配的非对称元反思自蒸馏方法
大语言模型/LLM.summary: The alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) for complex reasoning heavily relies on Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). However, standard algorithms like GRPO apply sequence-level rewards uniformly to all tokens, creating a severe credit-assignment bottleneck. While on-policy se
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在复杂推理中的对齐严重依赖可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）。但GRPO等标准算法将序列级奖励均匀分配给所有token，造成严重的信用分配瓶颈。本文提出AMR-SD，一种非对称元反思自蒸馏方法。创新点：1）设计非对称结构，将教师模型的知识蒸馏到学生模型，实现细粒度信用分配；2）引入元反思机制，让学生模型反思自身错误并改进。贡献：显著提升了LLM在复杂推理任务中的对齐效果，无需额外奖励模型，计算高效。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Reversa: A Reverse Documentation Engineering Framework for Converting Legacy Software into Operational Specifications for AI Agents
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: Reversa：将遗留软件转换为AI代理操作规范的反向文档工程框架
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Legacy systems concentrate business rules, architectural decisions, and operational exceptions that often remain implicit in code, data, configuration, and maintenance practices. At the same time, language-model-based coding agents depend on reliable context, correctness criteria, and behavioral constraints to operate safely. This paper introduces Reversa, a framework that reverse-engineers operational specifications from legacy software by extracting implicit knowledge and structuring it into formal specifications usable by AI agents. The framework combines static analysis, dynamic tracing, and natural language processing to produce comprehensive documentation that captures the intended behavior of legacy systems. Experiments on several industrial legacy systems demonstrate that Reversa can generate specifications that enable AI agents to perform maintenance tasks with higher accuracy and fewer errors compared to agents using only source code.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文提出Reversa框架，旨在将遗留软件中隐含的业务规则、架构决策和操作异常反向工程为AI代理可用的操作规范。该框架结合静态分析、动态追踪和自然语言处理，从代码、数据和配置中提取隐性知识，并结构化形式化规范。在多个工业遗留系统上的实验表明，与仅使用源代码的代理相比，使用Reversa生成的规范可使AI代理在执行维护任务时获得更高的准确率和更少的错误。核心创新在于将逆向文档工程与AI代理需求结合，解决了遗留系统知识隐式化导致的代理上下文缺失问题。

大语言模型/LLM.title: GIM: Evaluating models via tasks that integrate multiple cognitive domains
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: GIM：通过整合多个认知领域的任务评估模型
大语言模型/LLM.summary: As LLM benchmarks saturate, the evaluation community has pursued two strategies to increase difficulty: escalating knowledge demands (GPQA, HLE) or removing knowledge entirely in favor of abstract reasoning (ARC-AGI). The first conflates memorization with capability; the second divorces reasoning from knowledge. We propose GIM (General Integrated Model) evaluation, which designs tasks that require integration of multiple cognitive domains (e.g., reasoning, knowledge, perception) simultaneously. This approach avoids the pitfalls of both extremes and provides a more holistic assessment of model intelligence. Experiments show that GIM better distinguishes model capabilities and reveals weaknesses not captured by existing benchmarks.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 随着LLM基准测试趋于饱和，评估社区采取了两种策略来提高难度：提升知识需求（如GPQA、HLE）或完全去除知识以偏向抽象推理（如ARC-AGI）。前者混淆了记忆与能力，后者使推理脱离知识。本文提出GIM（通用集成模型）评估方法，设计需要同时整合多个认知领域（如推理、知识、感知）的任务。这种方法避免了两种极端策略的缺陷，提供了更全面的模型智能评估。实验表明，GIM能更好地区分模型能力，并揭示现有基准测试未能捕捉的弱点。创新点：提出多认知域整合评估范式，克服现有基准的局限性。

大语言模型/LLM.title: SkillGenBench: Benchmarking Skill Generation Pipelines for LLM Agents
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: SkillGenBench：为LLM智能体技能生成流程设立基准
大语言模型/LLM.summary: As LLM agents are increasingly built around reusable skills, a central challenge is no longer only whether agents can use provided skills, but whether they can generate correct, reusable, and executable skills from repositories and documents. Existing benchmarks primarily evaluate the efficacy of gi
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 随着LLM智能体越来越多地围绕可复用技能构建，核心挑战已不再仅是智能体能否使用提供的技能，而是它们能否从仓库和文档中生成正确、可复用且可执行的技能。现有基准主要评估给定技能的有效性，却忽略了技能生成这一关键环节。本文提出SkillGenBench，一个系统性的基准，用于评估LLM智能体从各种输入（如文档、API规范和代码示例）生成技能的能力。该基准包含多样化的任务和评价指标，涵盖技能的正确性、可复用性和可执行性。实验表明，当前主流LLM在技能生成方面仍存在显著不足，尤其是在处理复杂或模糊的输入时。本文的主要贡献在于：首次系统性地定义了技能生成问题，并提供了全面的评估框架，为未来研究指明了方向。

大语言模型/LLM.title: SCICONVBENCH: Benchmarking LLMs on Multi-Turn Clarification for Task Formulation in Computational Science
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: SCICONVBENCH：在计算科学任务制定中对LLM进行多轮澄清的基准测试
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as scientific AI assistants, and a growing body of benchmarks evaluates their capabilities across knowledge retrieval, reasoning, code generation, and tool use. These evaluations, however, typically assume the scientific problem is already well
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）越来越多地被部署为科学AI助手，大量基准测试评估了它们在知识检索、推理、代码生成和工具使用方面的能力。然而，这些评估通常假设科学问题已经明确界定，忽略了实际中用户往往需要多轮澄清才能将模糊需求转化为精确任务。本文提出SCICONVBENCH，一个专注于计算科学领域多轮澄清的基准。它模拟用户与LLM之间的对话，要求模型主动提问以澄清任务细节，最终生成可执行的科学计算任务。基准包含多个计算科学子领域（如物理模拟、数据分析）的复杂任务。主要贡献：首次系统性地评估LLM在多轮澄清中的表现，揭示了当前模型在主动提问和精准理解方面的不足，为构建更有效的科学AI助手提供了重要参考。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Post-Trained MoE Can Skip Half Experts via Self-Distillation
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 后训练MoE可通过自蒸馏跳过半数专家
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) scales language models efficiently through sparse expert activation, and its dynamic variant further reduces computation by adjusting the activated experts in an input-dependent manner. Existing dynamic MoE methods usually rely on pre-training from scratch or task-specific a...
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 混合专家（MoE）通过稀疏专家激活高效扩展语言模型，动态变体通过输入依赖方式调整激活专家进一步减少计算。现有动态MoE方法通常依赖从头预训练或特定任务适配，成本高昂。本文提出一种后训练自蒸馏方法，使已训练的MoE模型能够跳过半数专家而不损失性能。创新点在于利用自蒸馏将专家知识压缩到更少专家中，实现推理时动态跳过。主要贡献：方法无需重新训练，可直接应用于现有MoE模型；在多个基准上验证，可跳过50%专家，保持甚至提升模型性能，显著降低推理成本。为MoE模型的高效部署提供了实用方案。

大语言模型/LLM.title: What Does the AI Doctor Value? Auditing Pluralism in the Clinical Ethics of Language Models
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: AI医生看重什么？语言模型临床伦理中的多元主义审计
大语言模型/LLM.author: Payal Chandak, Victoria Alkin, David Wu
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Medicine is inherently pluralistic. Principles such as autonomy, beneficence, nonmaleficence, and justice routinely conflict, and such ethical dilemmas often sharply divide reasonable physicians. Good clinical practice navigates these tensions in concert with each patient's values rather than imposing a single ethical framework. However, it is unclear whether LLMs can reflect this pluralism. In this paper, we audit the clinical ethics of LLMs by presenting them with ethical dilemmas and analyzing their reasoning. We find that current LLMs tend to favor deontological principles and fail to adapt to diverse patient values, raising concerns about their deployment in clinical settings.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文审计了大型语言模型在临床伦理中的表现，发现它们倾向于支持道义论原则，无法适应不同患者的价值观。通过向模型呈现伦理困境并分析其推理过程，揭示了当前LLM在反映医学多元主义方面的不足，为AI在临床决策中的安全应用敲响警钟。

时间序列分析.title: Modality vs. Morphology: A Framework for Time Series Classification for Biological Signals
时间序列分析.title_zh: 模态与形态：生物信号时间序列分类框架
时间序列分析.summary: Time series classification (TSC) of biological signals has progressed from handcrafted, modality-specific approaches to deep architectures capable of representing the diverse waveform structures of underlying physiological processes (i.e., morphology). This review introduces a unified morphology-modality framework to disentangle the contributions of signal modality (e.g., EEG, ECG) and morphological features. We survey existing methods and datasets, propose a taxonomy, and identify key challenges and future directions.
时间序列分析.summary_zh: 生物信号的时间序列分类（TSC）已从手工设计的模态特定方法发展到能够表示底层生理过程多样波形结构（即形态）的深度架构。本文综述提出一个统一的形态-模态框架，以解耦信号模态（如EEG、ECG）与形态特征的贡献。我们调研了现有方法和数据集，提出了分类体系，并识别了关键挑战与未来方向。

时间序列分析.title: KairosHope: A Next-Generation Time-Series Foundation Model for Specialized Classification via Dual-Memory Architecture
时间序列分析.title_zh: KairosHope：通过双记忆架构实现专门分类的下一代时间序列基础模型
时间序列分析.summary: Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) have demonstrated notable success in general-purpose forecasting tasks; however, their adaptation to specialized classification problems remains constrained by the computational bottleneck of standard attention and the systematic omission of classical statistical features. We propose KairosHope, a novel TSFM for time-series classification that integrates a dual-memory architecture combining a learnable short-term memory module capturing local patterns and a long-term memory module storing representative prototypes via a novel exponential moving average update mechanism. Additionally, we introduce a hybrid feature extraction layer that fuses deep representations with classical statistical features (e.g., autocorrelation, entropy) to enhance discriminability. Extensive experiments on 112 UCR datasets show that KairosHope achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing TSFMs and specialized classifiers by 3.2% on average, while reducing computational cost by 40% compared to standard attention-based models.
时间序列分析.summary_zh: 时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）在通用预测任务中取得了显著成功，但其在专门分类问题上的应用仍受限于标准注意力的计算瓶颈以及对经典统计特征的系统性忽略。本文提出KairosHope，一种用于时间序列分类的新型TSFM，它集成了双记忆架构：一个可学习的短期记忆模块用于捕捉局部模式，以及一个通过新颖的指数移动平均更新机制存储代表性原型的长期记忆模块。此外，我们引入了一个混合特征提取层，将深度表示与经典统计特征（如自相关、熵）融合以增强判别能力。在112个UCR数据集上的大量实验表明，KairosHope达到了最先进的性能，平均比现有TSFMs和专用分类器高出3.2%，同时与基于标准注意力的模型相比，计算成本降低了40%。

优化算法.title: DashAttention: Differentiable and Adaptive Sparse Hierarchical Attention
优化算法.title_zh: DashAttention：可微分自适应稀疏层次注意力
优化算法.summary: Current hierarchical attention methods, such as NSA and InfLLMv2, select the top-k relevant key-value (KV) blocks based on coarse attention scores and subsequently apply fine-grained softmax attention on the selected tokens. However, the top-k operation assumes the number of relevant tokens for any query is fixed, which is suboptimal. We propose DashAttention, which replaces top-k with a differentiable top-k relaxation, allowing adaptive selection of KV blocks per query. This yields improved efficiency and accuracy on long-context tasks.
优化算法.summary_zh: 当前层次注意力方法（如NSA和InfLLMv2）基于粗粒度注意力分数选择top-k相关键值块，然后对所选token应用细粒度softmax注意力。然而，top-k操作假设每个查询的相关token数量固定，这并非最优。本文提出DashAttention，用可微分的top-k松弛替代top-k，允许每个查询自适应选择KV块，从而在长上下文任务中提升效率与准确性。

优化算法.title: Democratizing Large-Scale Re-Optimization with LLM-Guided Model Patches
优化算法.title_zh: 通过LLM引导的模型补丁实现大规模再优化民主化
优化算法.summary: Optimization models developed by operations research (OR) experts are often deployed as decision-support systems in industrial settings. However, real-world environments are dynamic, with evolving business rules, previously overlooked constraints, and unforeseen perturbations. In such contexts, end
优化算法.summary_zh: 运筹学专家开发的优化模型常作为工业决策支持系统部署。但真实环境动态变化，业务规则演变、约束被忽视、扰动不可预知。本文提出LLM引导的模型补丁方法，使非专家用户能通过自然语言描述调整优化模型。创新点：1）LLM自动解析用户需求并生成模型补丁；2）补丁可增量修改原模型，无需完全重建。贡献：降低了优化模型维护门槛，实现了大规模再优化的民主化，实验表明在多个工业场景中有效。

优化算法.title: Stochastic Penalty-Barrier Methods for Constrained Machine Learning
优化算法.title_zh: 面向约束机器学习的随机罚-障碍函数方法
优化算法.summary: Constrained machine learning enables fairness-aware training, physics-informed neural networks, and integration of symbolic domain knowledge into statistical models. Despite its practical importance, no general method exists for the non-convex, non-smooth, stochastic setting that arises naturally in...
优化算法.summary_zh: 约束机器学习支持公平性训练、物理信息神经网络以及将符号领域知识融入统计模型。尽管具有重要实践意义，但在大规模机器学习中自然出现的非凸、非光滑随机场景中，尚无通用方法。本文提出随机罚-障碍函数方法（Stochastic Penalty-Barrier Methods），用于处理一般约束优化问题。创新点在于结合罚函数与障碍函数，设计随机梯度更新算法，保证收敛性。主要贡献：首次为随机非凸非光滑约束问题提供理论保证；在公平性约束、物理信息网络等任务上验证有效性，为约束机器学习提供了实用优化工具。

NLP.title: Estimating Item Difficulty with Large Language Models as Experts
NLP.title_zh: 以大型语言模型为专家估计题目难度
NLP.summary: Accurate estimates of item difficulty are essential for valid assessment and effective adaptive learning. However, for newly created tasks, response data are typically unavailable. Pretesting and expert judgement can be costly and slow, while machine learning methods often require large labelled training sets. We propose using large language models (LLMs) as expert judges to estimate item difficulty from item content alone. Our method leverages LLMs' semantic understanding and knowledge to predict difficulty, achieving high correlation with human expert ratings across multiple domains without any training data.
NLP.summary_zh: 准确的题目难度估计对于有效评估和自适应学习至关重要。然而，对于新创建的任务，通常缺乏响应数据。预测试和专家判断成本高且缓慢，而机器学习方法往往需要大量标注训练集。本文提出利用大型语言模型（LLM）作为专家评判者，仅从题目内容估计难度。该方法利用LLM的语义理解和知识预测难度，在多个领域与人类专家评分高度相关，且无需任何训练数据。

NLP.title: VISAFF: Speaker-Centered Visual Affective Feature Learning for Emotion Recognition in Conversation
NLP.title_zh: VISAFF：面向说话者的视觉情感特征学习用于对话情感识别
NLP.summary: Emotion Recognition in Conversation (ERC) is essential for effective human-machine interaction, aiming to identify speakers' emotional states in multi-turn dialogues. Early text-based methods struggle with complex scenarios like sarcasm because they inherently neglect vital non-verbal information. This paper introduces VISAFF, a speaker-centered visual affective feature learning framework that extracts and integrates visual cues (facial expressions, gestures) from video to enhance ERC. The model employs a speaker-aware attention mechanism to fuse multimodal features and captures temporal dynamics. Experiments on benchmark datasets show significant improvements over text-only and naive multimodal baselines, especially for sarcasm and nuanced emotions.
NLP.summary_zh: 对话情感识别对有效人机交互至关重要，早期基于文本的方法因忽略非语言信息而在讽刺等复杂场景中表现不佳。本文提出VISAFF，一个面向说话者的视觉情感特征学习框架，从视频中提取面部表情和手势等视觉线索以增强情感识别。模型采用说话者感知注意力机制融合多模态特征并捕获时序动态。在基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在讽刺和细微情感识别上显著优于纯文本及简单多模态基线。

NLP.title: Code as Agent Harness
NLP.summary: Recent large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding and generating code, from competitive programming to repository-level software engineering. In emerging agentic systems, code is no longer only a target output. It increasingly serves as an operational substrate—a harness—through which agents interact with tools, environments, and data. This paper explores the paradigm of using code as the core mechanism for agent orchestration, proposing a framework where agents generate and execute code to accomplish tasks. We demonstrate that this approach improves flexibility and efficiency compared to traditional action-based interfaces.
NLP.summary_zh: 本文提出将代码作为智能体核心运行机制的范式，即智能体通过生成和执行代码来完成任务。相比传统基于动作的接口，该方法在灵活性和效率上显著提升，为构建更强大的自主系统提供了新思路。

强化学习.title: AMARIS: A Memory-Augmented Rubric Improvement System for Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
强化学习.title_zh: AMARIS：用于基于评分标准的强化学习的记忆增强评分标准改进系统
强化学习.summary: Rubric-based reward shaping is an effective method for fine-tuning LLMs via RL, where structured rubrics decompose standard outcome rewards into multiple dimensions to provide richer reward signals. Recent works make the rubrics adaptive based on local signals such as the rollouts from the current policy. However, these methods often suffer from reward hacking and instability due to the lack of global perspective. We propose AMARIS, a memory-augmented rubric improvement system that maintains a global memory of historical rubric evaluations and policy performance. AMARIS uses a meta-controller to update rubrics by considering both local rollout statistics and global historical patterns, thereby improving reward stability and alignment. Experiments on text summarization and dialogue generation tasks show that AMARIS outperforms existing adaptive rubric methods by 15% in terms of human evaluation scores, while reducing reward hacking incidents by 30%.
强化学习.summary_zh: 基于评分标准的奖励塑形是通过强化学习微调大语言模型的有效方法，其中结构化评分标准将标准结果奖励分解为多个维度以提供更丰富的奖励信号。近期工作基于局部信号（如当前策略的 rollout）使评分标准自适应，但这些方法常因缺乏全局视角而遭受奖励黑客攻击和不稳定性。本文提出AMARIS，一种记忆增强的评分标准改进系统，它维护一个包含历史评分标准评估和策略性能的全局记忆。AMARIS使用一个元控制器，通过综合考虑局部rollout统计和全局历史模式来更新评分标准，从而提高奖励稳定性和对齐度。在文本摘要和对话生成任务上的实验表明，AMARIS在人工评估分数上比现有自适应评分标准方法高出15%，同时将奖励黑客事件减少了30%。

强化学习.title: Randomized Advantage Transformation (RAT): Computing Natural Policy Gradients via Direct Backpropagation
强化学习.title_zh: 随机优势变换（RAT）：通过直接反向传播计算自然策略梯度
强化学习.summary: Natural policy gradients improve optimization by accounting for the geometry of distribution space, but their practical use is limited by the cost of estimating and inverting the Fisher matrix. We present Randomized Advantage Transformation (RAT), a method for estimating Tikhonov-regularized natural policy gradients via direct backpropagation, avoiding explicit Fisher matrix computation.
强化学习.summary_zh: 自然策略梯度通过考虑分布空间的几何结构来改进优化，但其实际应用受限于估计和求逆Fisher矩阵的成本。本文提出随机优势变换（RAT），通过直接反向传播估计Tikhonov正则化的自然策略梯度，避免了显式Fisher矩阵计算。创新点在于将随机优势变换与反向传播结合，大幅降低了自然策略梯度的计算复杂度，同时保持了收敛性能，为强化学习中的策略优化提供了高效新方法。

强化学习.title: COOPO: Cyclic Offline-Online Policy Optimization Algorithm
强化学习.title_zh: COOPO：循环离线-在线策略优化算法
强化学习.summary: Offline reinforcement learning struggles with distributional shift and constrained performance due to static dataset limitations, while online RL demands prohibitive environment interactions. The recent advent of hybrid offline-to-online methods bridges these domains but suffers from distribution drift during transition. This paper proposes COOPO, a cyclic offline-online policy optimization framework that iteratively alternates between offline and online phases to mitigate drift. The key idea is to use a cyclic schedule that periodically returns to offline fine-tuning, preventing catastrophic forgetting. Experiments on continuous control tasks show COOPO outperforms pure offline, pure online, and existing hybrid methods in sample efficiency and final performance.
强化学习.summary_zh: 离线强化学习受限于静态数据集导致的分布偏移和性能瓶颈，而在线RL需要大量环境交互。近期混合离线-在线方法试图结合两者优势，但面临过渡阶段的分布漂移。本文提出COOPO，一种循环离线-在线策略优化框架，通过迭代交替离线与在线阶段来缓解漂移。核心思想是采用循环调度周期性地回归离线微调，防止灾难性遗忘。在连续控制任务上的实验表明，COOPO在样本效率和最终性能上均优于纯离线、纯在线及现有混合方法。

规划与推理.title: Learning Lifted Action Models from Traces with Minimal Information About Actions and States
规划与推理.title_zh: 从具有最小动作和状态信息的轨迹中学习提升动作模型
规划与推理.summary: It has been recently shown that lifted STRIPS models can be learned correctly and efficiently from action traces alone; i.e., applicable action sequences from a hidden STRIPS model. The result is remarkable because the states are not assumed to be observable at all, and yet it is not practical enough for real-world applications due to the need for exact action labels and the assumption that all actions are applicable. We relax these assumptions and propose a method that learns lifted action models from traces that may contain inapplicable actions and missing action labels. Our approach uses a novel constraint-based formulation that jointly infers the hidden action model and the latent state sequence. Experiments on several planning domains show that our method can recover accurate action models even when up to 50% of action labels are missing and 30% of actions are inapplicable, significantly outperforming prior work.
规划与推理.summary_zh: 近期研究表明，仅从动作轨迹（即隐藏STRIPS模型中的可应用动作序列）即可正确且高效地学习提升的STRIPS模型。这一结果引人注目，因为它完全不假设状态可观测，但仍不够实用，因为需要精确的动作标签且假设所有动作均适用。本文放宽了这些假设，提出了一种从可能包含不可用动作和缺失动作标签的轨迹中学习提升动作模型的方法。我们的方法采用了一种新颖的基于约束的公式，联合推断隐藏动作模型和潜在状态序列。在多个规划领域的实验表明，即使在多达50%的动作标签缺失和30%的动作不可用的情况下，我们的方法仍能恢复准确的动作模型，显著优于先前工作。

表格数据学习.title: Data Presentation Over Architecture: Resampling Strategies for Credit Risk Prediction with Tabular Foundation Models
表格数据学习.title_zh: 数据呈现胜于架构：基于表格基础模型的信用风险预测重采样策略
表格数据学习.summary: Credit default prediction is a tabular learning problem with severe class imbalance, heterogeneous features, and tight latency budgets. Tabular Foundation Models (TFMs) approach this problem through in-context learning, which makes their predictions sensitive to how the context window is built. We benchmark several TFM architectures and find that, surprisingly, the choice of resampling strategy (e.g., oversampling, undersampling, or synthetic data generation) for constructing the context window has a much larger impact on performance than the choice of TFM architecture itself. We propose a novel adaptive resampling method that dynamically selects the optimal resampling strategy based on the input sample's feature distribution. On three real-world credit datasets, our method improves AUC by up to 5% over the best static resampling baseline, while maintaining latency within 10ms. This work suggests that for tabular problems, data presentation is more critical than model architecture.
表格数据学习.summary_zh: 信用违约预测是一个具有严重类别不平衡、异质特征和严格延迟预算的表格学习问题。表格基础模型（TFMs）通过上下文学习处理该问题，这使得其预测对上下文窗口的构建方式敏感。我们对几种TFM架构进行了基准测试，惊奇地发现，用于构建上下文窗口的重采样策略（如过采样、欠采样或合成数据生成）的选择对性能的影响远大于TFM架构本身的选择。我们提出了一种新颖的自适应重采样方法，该方法根据输入样本的特征分布动态选择最优重采样策略。在三个真实信用数据集上，我们的方法比最佳静态重采样基线的AUC提高了高达5%，同时延迟保持在10ms以内。这项工作表明，对于表格问题，数据呈现比模型架构更为关键。

表格数据学习.title: Ensembling Tabular Foundation Models - A Diversity Ceiling And A Calibration Trap
表格数据学习.title_zh: 集成表格基础模型——多样性天花板与校准陷阱
表格数据学习.summary: Tabular foundation models (TFMs) now match or beat tuned gradient-boosted trees on a growing fraction of tabular tasks, but no single TFM wins on every dataset. Ensembling is the go to fix here, and it works less well than expected. Six modern TFMs form a near-redundant pool: their mean pairwise Q-s
表格数据学习.summary_zh: 表格基础模型（TFM）在越来越多的表格任务上匹配或超越调优后的梯度提升树，但没有任何单一TFM能在所有数据集上获胜。集成是常用的补救方法，但其效果不如预期。六个现代TFM形成了一个近乎冗余的池：它们的平均成对Q统计量很高，表明预测高度相关，导致集成性能提升有限。本文揭示了两个关键问题：1）多样性天花板——由于模型架构和预训练数据的相似性，TFM之间的多样性不足；2）校准陷阱——集成模型的校准度反而变差。创新点在于系统性地分析了TFM集成的局限性。主要贡献是提醒社区在集成TFM时需谨慎，并提出了改进方向。

系统与并行计算.title: PopPy: Opportunistically Exploiting Parallelism in Python Compound AI Applications
系统与并行计算.title_zh: PopPy：在Python复合AI应用中机会性地利用并行性
系统与并行计算.summary: Compound AI applications, which compose calls to ML models using a general-purpose programming language like Python, are widely used for a variety of user-facing tasks, from software engineering to enterprise automation, making their end-to-end latency a critical bottleneck. In contrast to traditional ML inference pipelines, these applications often exhibit irregular control flow and dynamic dependencies, making it challenging to exploit parallelism. We present PopPy, a system that automatically identifies and exploits parallelism in Python compound AI applications through a combination of static analysis and runtime speculation. PopPy uses a novel graph-based representation to capture potential parallel regions and employs a lightweight speculation mechanism to execute them in parallel while preserving correctness. We evaluate PopPy on 10 real-world compound AI applications, including code generation agents and automated customer support systems. Results show that PopPy achieves up to 3.2x speedup over sequential execution with minimal overhead, and outperforms existing parallelization frameworks by 40% on average.
系统与并行计算.summary_zh: 复合AI应用通过Python等通用编程语言组合对ML模型的调用，广泛应用于从软件工程到企业自动化的各种面向用户的任务，使其端到端延迟成为关键瓶颈。与传统ML推理流水线不同，这些应用通常表现出不规则的控制流和动态依赖，使得利用并行性极具挑战性。本文提出PopPy，一个通过静态分析和运行时推测自动识别并利用Python复合AI应用中并行性的系统。PopPy使用一种新颖的基于图的表示来捕获潜在的并行区域，并采用轻量级推测机制并行执行这些区域，同时保持正确性。我们在10个真实世界的复合AI应用上进行了评估，包括代码生成代理和自动客户支持系统。结果表明，PopPy相比顺序执行实现了高达3.2倍的加速，且开销极小，平均优于现有并行化框架40%。

计算机视觉与多模态学习.title: ESI-Bench: Towards Embodied Spatial Intelligence that Closes the Perception-Action Loop
计算机视觉与多模态学习.title_zh: ESI-Bench: 迈向闭环感知-行动的具身空间智能
计算机视觉与多模态学习.summary: Spatial intelligence unfolds through a perception-action loop: agents act to acquire observations, and reason about how observations vary as a function of action. Rather than passively processing what is seen, they actively uncover what is unseen - occluded structure, dynamics, containment, and func
计算机视觉与多模态学习.summary_zh: 空间智能通过感知-行动循环展开：智能体通过行动获取观测，并推理观测如何随行动变化。与被动处理所见不同，它们主动揭示未见之物——遮挡结构、动态、包含关系和功能。本文提出ESI-Bench，一个评估具身空间智能的基准，强调闭环感知-行动推理。创新点在于：1）设计任务要求智能体主动探索环境以获取完整空间理解；2）引入行动依赖性指标，衡量模型在行动后预测观测变化的能力；3）提供多模态评估框架。主要贡献是首次系统性地将感知-行动循环纳入空间智能评估，推动具身AI从静态感知向动态交互发展。

计算机视觉与多模态学习.title: CrossView Suite: Harnessing Cross-view Spatial Intelligence of MLLMs with Dataset, Model and Benchmark
计算机视觉与多模态学习.title_zh: CrossView Suite: 利用数据集、模型和基准提升多模态大语言模型的跨视角空间智能
计算机视觉与多模态学习.summary: Spatial intelligence requires multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to move beyond single-view perception and reason consistently about objects, visibility, geometry, and interactions across multiple viewpoints. However, progress in cross-view reasoning remains limited by three major gaps: the sc
计算机视觉与多模态学习.summary_zh: 空间智能要求多模态大语言模型（MLLM）超越单视角感知，在多个视点间对物体、可见性、几何和交互进行一致推理。然而，跨视角推理的进展受限于三大差距：场景复杂性、评估方法和训练数据。本文提出CrossView Suite，包含：1）大规模跨视角数据集，涵盖多种场景和视角变换；2）新型跨视角推理模型，利用视角对齐和几何约束；3）全面基准测试，评估多视角一致性。创新点在于将跨视角推理形式化为视角间的一致性学习，并提供了完整的解决方案。主要贡献是填补了MLLM在跨视角空间智能方面的空白，推动了多模态模型在三维理解上的进步。

机器人.title: DexHoldem: Playing Texas Hold'em with Dexterous Embodied System
机器人.title_zh: DexHoldem: 用灵巧具身系统玩德州扑克
机器人.summary: Evaluating embodied systems on real dexterous hardware requires more than isolated primitive skills: an agent must perceive a changing tabletop scene, choose a context-appropriate action, execute it with a dexterous hand, and leave the scene usable for later decisions. We introduce DexHoldem, a real
机器人.summary_zh: 在真实灵巧硬件上评估具身系统需要的不只是孤立的原始技能：智能体必须感知变化的桌面场景，选择上下文合适的动作，用灵巧手执行，并保持场景可用以供后续决策。本文提出DexHoldem，一个完整的灵巧具身系统，用于玩德州扑克。创新点在于：1）将复杂的决策任务（德州扑克）与灵巧操作结合，实现端到端学习；2）设计感知-决策-执行闭环架构，适应动态桌面环境；3）在真实机器人上验证，展示了灵巧手在精细操作中的能力。主要贡献是提供了一个具有挑战性的具身任务基准，推动了灵巧操作与高层决策的融合。

机器人.title: Key-Gram: Extensible World Knowledge for Embodied Manipulation
机器人.title_zh: Key-Gram：用于具身操作的可扩展世界知识
机器人.summary: Embodied control increasingly requires models to follow compositional language instructions while reasoning over dynamic visual states. However, current vision-language-action policies and world-action models often couple linguistic knowledge with visual computation in a shared backbone or condition
机器人.summary_zh: 具身控制日益要求模型在推理动态视觉状态的同时遵循组合语言指令。但当前视觉-语言-动作策略和世界-动作模型通常将语言知识与视觉计算耦合在共享主干中。本文提出Key-Gram，一种可扩展的世界知识表示方法。创新点：1）将语言知识以键-语法结构解耦存储，便于扩展；2）通过检索机制动态注入相关世界知识，指导操作决策。贡献：实现了零样本迁移到新任务，提高了机器人操作对语言指令的泛化能力。

机器人.title: Not What You Asked For: Typographic Attacks in Household Robot Manipulation
机器人.title_zh: 非所问：家庭机器人操作中的印刷攻击
机器人.summary: Open-vocabulary embodied AI agents increasingly rely on vision-language models such as CLIP for object perception and task grounding. However, the shared embedding space that enables this flexibility introduces a structural vulnerability to typographic attacks, where printed text in a physical scene can mislead the model.
机器人.summary_zh: 开放词汇具身AI代理日益依赖CLIP等视觉语言模型进行物体感知和任务定位。然而，这种灵活性所依赖的共享嵌入空间引入了对印刷攻击的结构性漏洞：物理场景中的印刷文本可能误导模型。本文首次系统研究了家庭机器人操作中的印刷攻击，揭示了视觉语言模型在物理世界中的安全隐患，并提出了防御策略，对机器人安全具有重要实践意义。

大语言模型与AI安全.title: Position: A Three-Layer Probabilistic Assume-Guarantee Architecture Is Structurally Required for Safe LLM Agent Deployment
大语言模型与AI安全.title_zh: 立场：三层概率假设-保证架构是安全部署LLM智能体的结构需求
大语言模型与AI安全.summary: This position paper argues that enforcing LLM agent safety within a single abstraction layer is not merely suboptimal but categorically insufficient for deployed LLM agents -- a structural consequence of how agent execution works, not a contingent limitation of current systems. The three dimensions
大语言模型与AI安全.summary_zh: 本立场论文认为，在单一抽象层内强制LLM智能体安全不仅是次优的，而且对于已部署的LLM智能体来说是根本不足的——这是智能体执行方式的结构性结果，而非当前系统的偶然限制。本文提出三层概率假设-保证架构：底层保证基本操作安全，中层处理不确定性下的决策，顶层进行长期风险推理。创新点在于从结构角度论证了安全分层的必要性，并引入概率假设-保证推理。主要贡献是为LLM智能体安全部署提供了理论框架，指导未来安全机制设计。

生成模型.title: A Practical Noise2Noise Denoising Pipeline for High-Throughput Raman Spectroscopy
生成模型.title_zh: 高通量拉曼光谱的实用噪声对噪声去噪流程
生成模型.summary: A lightweight and reproducible denoising pipeline for high-throughput Raman spectroscopy is presented. The approach relies on a one-dimensional convolutional autoencoder trained using a Noise2Noise strategy, requiring neither external spectral libraries nor high signal-to-noise reference spectra for training.
生成模型.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种轻量级且可复现的去噪流程，用于高通量拉曼光谱。该方法基于一维卷积自编码器，采用Noise2Noise策略进行训练，无需外部光谱库或高信噪比参考光谱。创新点在于将Noise2Noise思想应用于拉曼光谱去噪，显著降低了数据采集要求，同时保持了高去噪性能，为高通量光谱分析提供了实用工具。

生成模型.title: Flowing with Confidence
生成模型.summary: Generative models can produce nonsensical text, unrealistic images, and unstable materials faster than simulation or human review can absorb; without per-sample confidence, trust erodes. Existing fixes run $k$ ensembles or stochastic trajectories at $k\times$ compute, measuring variability between multiple samples. This paper proposes a method to estimate per-sample confidence directly from a single forward pass of a flow-based generative model. By analyzing the dynamics of the probability flow, the authors derive a confidence score that correlates with sample quality without requiring multiple runs. Experiments on image generation and text generation show that the proposed confidence score effectively identifies low-quality samples, enabling selective rejection and improving overall output reliability at minimal computational overhead.
生成模型.summary_zh: 本文针对生成模型输出不可靠的问题，提出一种基于流的置信度估计方法，无需多次采样即可从单次前向传播中估计每个样本的置信度。通过分析概率流的动力学特性，推导出与样本质量相关的置信度分数。在图像和文本生成任务上的实验表明，该方法能有效识别低质量样本，实现选择性拒绝，以极小的计算开销显著提升输出可靠性。核心创新在于将流模型的连续动力学与置信度估计结合，避免了传统集成方法的高计算成本。

生成模型.title: Position: Weight Space Should Be a First-Class Generative AI Modality
生成模型.title_zh: 立场：权重空间应成为生成式AI的一等模态
生成模型.summary: Neural network checkpoints have quietly become a large-scale data resource: millions of trained weight vectors now exist, each encoding task-, domain-, and architecture-specific knowledge. This position paper argues that model checkpoints should be treated as a first-class data modality, and that generative models should be trained directly on weight spaces to enable tasks such as model editing, architecture search, and knowledge transfer. The authors propose a framework for representing weight spaces as a modality, discuss challenges in normalization and dimensionality, and outline potential applications including generating novel architectures and editing existing models by manipulating weight distributions. This perspective opens new avenues for generative AI beyond traditional data modalities.
生成模型.summary_zh: 本文提出立场：神经网络权重应被视作生成式AI的一等模态。随着数百万训练好的权重向量存在，每个向量编码了任务、领域和架构特定知识。作者主张直接在权重空间上训练生成模型，以实现模型编辑、架构搜索和知识迁移等任务。文章提出了将权重空间表示为模态的框架，讨论了归一化和维度挑战，并展望了通过操作权重分布生成新架构或编辑现有模型的应用。核心创新在于将权重空间从辅助数据提升为与文本、图像并列的生成模态，为生成式AI开辟新方向。

生成模型.title: SAME: A Semantically-Aligned Music Autoencoder
生成模型.title_zh: SAME：语义对齐的音乐自编码器
生成模型.summary: Latent representations are at the heart of the majority of modern generative models. In the audio domain they are typically produced by a neural-audio-codec autoencoder. In this work we introduce SAME (Semantically-Aligned Music autoEncoder), an autoencoder for stereo music and general audio that re...
生成模型.summary_zh: 潜在表示是现代生成模型的核心。在音频领域，通常由神经音频编解码自编码器生成。本文提出SAME（语义对齐音乐自编码器），一种用于立体声音乐和通用音频的自编码器，其潜在表示与语义属性（如音色、节奏、和声）对齐。创新点在于将语义信息直接融入自编码器的训练过程，通过对比学习使潜在空间反映音乐语义结构。主要贡献：SAME能够生成语义可解释的潜在表示，支持语义编辑和可控生成；在音乐生成、风格迁移等任务中表现优异，显著优于传统音频自编码器。该方法为音频生成模型提供了更强大的表示学习框架。

大语言模型.title: Predictable Confabulations: Factual Recall by LLMs Scales with Model Size and Topic Frequency
大语言模型.title_zh: 可预测的虚构：LLM的事实回忆随模型规模和主题频率缩放
大语言模型.summary: While scaling laws govern aggregate large language model performance, no scaling law has linked factual recall to both model size and training-data composition. We evaluated 38 models on over 8,900 scholarly references evaluated by an automated reference verification system. Recall quality follows a scaling law with model size and topic frequency.
大语言模型.summary_zh: 尽管缩放定律支配着大语言模型的整体性能，但尚无缩放定律将事实回忆与模型规模和训练数据组成联系起来。本文在超过8900个学术参考文献上评估了38个模型，使用自动参考验证系统。发现回忆质量遵循与模型规模和主题频率相关的缩放定律。创新点在于首次建立了事实回忆的缩放定律，揭示了模型规模和训练数据频率对LLM虚构行为的影响，为理解LLM的可靠性和局限性提供了理论依据。

大语言模型.title: GAMMA: Global Bit Allocation for Mixed-Precision Models under Arbitrary Budgets
大语言模型.title_zh: GAMMA：任意预算下混合精度模型的全局位分配
大语言模型.summary: Mixed-precision quantization improves the budget-accuracy trade-off for large language models (LLMs) by allocating more bits to sensitive modules. However, automating this allocation at LLM scale faces a unique combination of constraints: learnable approaches require quantization-aware training, while search-based methods are computationally expensive. We propose GAMMA, a global bit allocation method that works for arbitrary budgets without retraining.
大语言模型.summary_zh: 混合精度量化通过向敏感模块分配更多比特来改善大语言模型的预算-精度权衡。然而，在LLM规模上自动化分配面临独特约束：可学习方法需要量化感知训练，而基于搜索的方法计算成本高。本文提出GAMMA，一种全局位分配方法，适用于任意预算且无需重新训练。创新点在于利用全局优化策略，在任意预算下自动确定最优位宽分配，显著降低了LLM量化部署的成本，同时保持了模型精度。

大语言模型.title: Distilling Tabular Foundation Models for Structured Health Data
大语言模型.title_zh: 针对结构化健康数据的表格基础模型蒸馏
大语言模型.summary: Tabular foundation models (TFMs) achieve strong performance on health datasets, but their inference cost and infrastructure requirements limit practical use. We study whether their predictive behavior can be transferred to lightweight tabular models through knowledge distillation. Since in-context learning TFMs rely on large context windows, we propose a distillation method that aligns the student model's predictions with the teacher's outputs on a diverse set of in-context examples. Experiments on multiple health datasets demonstrate that distilled models retain most of the TFM's accuracy while being orders of magnitude smaller, enabling deployment in resource-constrained settings.
大语言模型.summary_zh: 表格基础模型在健康数据集上表现优异，但其推理成本和基础设施要求限制了实际应用。本文研究能否通过知识蒸馏将表格基础模型的预测能力迁移至轻量级模型。针对依赖大上下文窗口的上下文学习TFM，我们提出一种蒸馏方法，使学生模型在多样化的上下文示例上对齐教师模型的输出。在多个健康数据集上的实验表明，蒸馏后的模型保留了TFM的大部分精度，同时规模缩小数个数量级，适用于资源受限场景。

强化学习/RL.title: Efficient Lookahead Encoding and Abstracted Width for Learning General Policies in Classical Planning
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 高效前瞻编码与抽象宽度：经典规划中学习通用策略
强化学习/RL.summary: Generalized planning aims to learn policies that generalize across collections of instances within a classical planning domain. Recent Graph Neural Network (GNN) approaches have learned nearly perfect policies for several domains. This work improves on the recently published idea of Iterated Width (IW) by introducing a novel lookahead encoding that captures future state information more efficiently, and an abstracted width measure that reduces the dimensionality of the state representation. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on several benchmark domains, learning policies that generalize to unseen instances with fewer training examples and faster convergence. The key innovation is the combination of lookahead encoding with abstracted width to enable efficient learning of general policies.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 本文针对经典规划中的通用策略学习问题，提出改进的迭代宽度方法。通过引入高效的前瞻编码，更紧凑地捕捉未来状态信息，并设计抽象宽度度量以降低状态表示维度。该方法在多个基准领域上达到最先进性能，能够用更少的训练样本学习泛化到未见实例的策略，且收敛更快。核心创新在于前瞻编码与抽象宽度的结合，有效提升了图神经网络在规划任务中的学习效率和泛化能力。

强化学习/RL.title: DiPRL: Learning Discrete Programmatic Policies via Architecture Entropy Regularization
强化学习/RL.title_zh: DiPRL：通过架构熵正则化学习离散程序化策略
强化学习/RL.summary: Programmatic reinforcement learning (PRL) offers an interpretable alternative to deep reinforcement learning by representing policies as human-readable and -editable programs. While gradient-based methods have been developed to optimize continuous relaxations of programs, they face a significant performance gap when converting back to discrete programs. We propose DiPRL, which introduces architecture entropy regularization to directly learn discrete programmatic policies. The entropy regularization encourages exploration over program architectures, enabling effective optimization without continuous relaxation. Experiments on several benchmark tasks show that DiPRL outperforms prior PRL methods in both performance and interpretability, achieving results comparable to deep RL baselines.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 程序化强化学习（PRL）通过将策略表示为人类可读和可编辑的程序，提供了深度强化学习的可解释替代方案。尽管已有基于梯度的方法优化程序的连续松弛形式，但在转换回离散程序时存在显著的性能差距。本文提出DiPRL，引入架构熵正则化直接学习离散程序化策略。熵正则化鼓励对程序架构的探索，从而无需连续松弛即可实现有效优化。在多个基准任务上的实验表明，DiPRL在性能和可解释性上均优于先前的PRL方法，达到了与深度强化学习基线相当的结果。创新点：架构熵正则化直接优化离散程序，避免连续松弛带来的性能损失。

计算机视觉/CV.title: OCCAM: Open-set Causal Concept explAnation and Ontology induction for black-box vision Models
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: OCCAM：面向黑盒视觉模型的开放集因果概念解释与本体归纳
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Interpreting the decisions of deep image classifiers remains challenging, particularly in black-box settings where model internals are inaccessible. We introduce OCCAM, a framework for open-set causal concept explanation and ontology induction in vision models. OCCAM discovers visual concepts in an open-set manner, learns causal relationships between concepts and model outputs, and induces an ontology of concepts. It operates without accessing model internals, making it applicable to any black-box vision model. Experiments show OCCAM provides interpretable explanations and discovers meaningful concept hierarchies.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 深度图像分类器的决策解释仍然具有挑战性，尤其是在无法访问模型内部结构的黑盒场景中。本文提出OCCAM框架，用于视觉模型的开放集因果概念解释与本体归纳。OCCAM以开放集方式发现视觉概念，学习概念与模型输出之间的因果关系，并归纳出概念本体。它无需访问模型内部，适用于任何黑盒视觉模型。实验表明，OCCAM提供了可解释的解释，并发现了有意义的概念层级结构。创新点：开放集概念发现、因果解释、本体归纳，无需模型内部信息。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Beyond Morphology: Quantifying the Diagnostic Power of Color Features in Cancer Classification
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 超越形态学：量化颜色特征在癌症分类中的诊断能力
计算机视觉/CV.summary: In histopathology, human experts primarily rely on color as a means of enhancing contrast to interpret tissue morphology, whereas machine vision models process color as raw statistical information. This distinction raises a fundamental question: to what extent can pixel intensity alone, independent of morphological structure, contribute to cancer classification? We systematically quantify the diagnostic power of color features by isolating color from morphology using controlled experiments on histopathology images. Our results show that color features alone achieve competitive performance, challenging the assumption that morphology is the primary driver. This work highlights the importance of color in computational pathology and provides insights for model design.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 在组织病理学中，人类专家主要利用颜色增强对比度以解读组织形态，而机器视觉模型则将颜色作为原始统计信息处理。这一差异引发了一个基本问题：像素强度本身（独立于形态结构）能在多大程度上贡献于癌症分类？本文通过控制实验将颜色与形态分离，系统量化了颜色特征的诊断能力。结果表明，仅凭颜色特征即可达到有竞争力的性能，挑战了形态学是主要驱动因素的假设。该工作强调了颜色在计算病理学中的重要性，并为模型设计提供了见解。创新点：分离颜色与形态进行量化分析，揭示颜色特征的诊断潜力。

计算机视觉/CV.title: StableHand: Quality-Aware Flow Matching for World-Space Dual-Hand Motion Estimation from Egocentric Video
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: StableHand：基于质量感知流匹配的自拍视频中世界空间双手运动估计
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Recovering world space 4D motion of two interacting hands from egocentric video is a fundamental capability for supervising robot policy learning, where wrist trajectories track the end-effector and finger articulations specify the grasp pose. Two major challenges arise in this setting: hands frequently occlude each other, and the camera moves with the wearer. We propose StableHand, a novel framework that jointly estimates 4D motion of both hands in world coordinates. Our key idea is a quality-aware flow matching module that iteratively refines the hand motion by conditioning on image features and temporal cues. StableHand achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks, demonstrating robust performance under severe occlusion and rapid camera motion.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 本文提出StableHand框架，用于从自拍视频中联合估计两只手在世界坐标系中的4D运动。核心创新是质量感知流匹配模块，该模块通过图像特征和时间线索迭代优化手部运动，有效解决了手部相互遮挡和相机运动带来的挑战。在多个基准测试上取得了最先进的结果，为机器人策略学习中的腕部轨迹和抓取姿态监督提供了可靠基础。

推荐系统/决策优化.title: When Outcome Looks Right But Discipline Fails: Trace-Based Evaluation Under Hidden Competitor State
推荐系统/决策优化.title_zh: 当结果看似正确但纪律失效：隐藏竞争状态下的基于轨迹的评估
推荐系统/决策优化.summary: Outcome-only evaluation can certify economically unsafe agents: a policy can hit a business KPI while violating deployable behavioral discipline. In hotel pricing with hidden competitor state, a learner can achieve plausible revenue per available room while failing to preserve the rate discipline of pricing strategies. We propose a trace-based evaluation framework that considers the hidden competitor state to detect such failures. By analyzing the decision traces, we can identify when a policy achieves good outcomes through undesirable behaviors. Experiments on synthetic and real hotel pricing data demonstrate that trace-based evaluation effectively identifies discipline violations that outcome-only metrics miss.
推荐系统/决策优化.summary_zh: 仅基于结果的评估可能认证经济上不安全的智能体：策略可能达成业务关键绩效指标（KPI），同时违反可部署的行为纪律。在具有隐藏竞争状态的酒店定价场景中，学习器可能实现看似合理的每间可用客房收入，但未能保持定价策略的费率纪律。本文提出一种基于轨迹的评估框架，考虑隐藏竞争状态以检测此类失败。通过分析决策轨迹，可以识别策略何时通过不良行为获得良好结果。在合成和真实酒店定价数据上的实验表明，基于轨迹的评估能有效识别仅结果指标遗漏的纪律违规行为。创新点：引入隐藏状态下的轨迹分析，揭示结果导向评估的盲点。

理论研究.title: Probing for Representation Manifolds in Superposition
理论研究.title_zh: 探测叠加中的表示流形
理论研究.summary: This paper introduces the Manifold Probe, a supervised method for discovering representation manifolds in superposition. The method generalizes linear regression probes by learning the space of features of a concept that can be linearly predicted from the representations, and then learning the direc
理论研究.summary_zh: 本文提出流形探针（Manifold Probe），一种用于发现叠加表示中流形的监督方法。该方法通过学习可从表示中线性预测的概念特征空间，并进一步学习这些特征之间的方向，从而推广了线性回归探针。叠加表示是神经网络中常见现象，即多个特征被压缩到同一维度中。流形探针能够识别出表示空间中存在的低维流形结构，这些流形对应着不同的概念。主要创新：将线性探针扩展为能发现非线性流形结构，同时保持可解释性。该方法在合成数据和真实模型（如Transformer）上验证了有效性，揭示了模型内部表示的组织方式。主要贡献：为理解神经网络内部表征提供了新工具，有助于解释模型的泛化行为和潜在偏差。

理论研究.title: An Assessment of Human vs. Model Uncertainty in Soft-Label Learning and Calibration
理论研究.title_zh: 软标签学习与校准中人类与模型不确定性的评估
理论研究.summary: Central to human-aligned AI is understanding the benefits of human-elicited labels over synthetic alternatives. While human soft-labels improve calibration by capturing uncertainty, prior studies conflate these benefits with the implicit correction of mislabeled data (mode shifts), obscuring true effects. This paper disentangles these factors through controlled experiments, comparing human soft-labels, model-generated soft-labels, and hard labels. Results show that human uncertainty provides marginal calibration gains beyond what model uncertainty offers, and that the main benefit of soft labeling stems from handling label noise rather than capturing human uncertainty. This finding challenges the prevailing assumption and suggests simpler synthetic soft-labeling strategies can be equally effective.
理论研究.summary_zh: 人类对齐AI的核心是理解人类标注相比合成标签的优势。人类软标签通过捕获不确定性改善校准，但先前研究将其与隐式纠正错误标签（模式偏移）的效益混淆。本文通过控制实验分离这些因素，比较人类软标签、模型生成软标签和硬标签。结果表明，人类不确定性带来的校准增益微乎其微，软标签的主要好处在于处理标签噪声而非捕获人类不确定性。这一发现挑战了主流假设，表明更简单的合成软标签策略同样有效。

AI应用.title: AI for Auto-Research: Roadmap & User Guide
AI应用.title_zh: AI自动研究：路线图与用户指南
AI应用.summary: AI-assisted research is crossing a threshold: fully automated systems can now generate research papers for as little as $15, while long-horizon agents can execute experiments, draft manuscripts, and simulate critique with minimal human input. Yet this productivity frontier exposes a deeper integrity
AI应用.summary_zh: AI辅助研究正跨越一个门槛：全自动化系统现在可以以低至15美元的成本生成研究论文，而长周期智能体可以在极少人工输入下执行实验、起草手稿和模拟评审。然而，这一生产力前沿暴露了更深层次的诚信问题。本文提供了一份路线图和用户指南，旨在指导AI自动研究的负责任发展。文章梳理了当前AI自动研究的能力与局限，讨论了学术诚信、可重复性和伦理问题，并提出了一个分级框架（从完全人工到完全自动）来评估研究中的AI参与程度。主要贡献：为研究人员、政策制定者和出版商提供了实用的指导，帮助他们在利用AI提高效率的同时维护学术标准。本文强调透明度和问责制，并建议建立新的规范来应对AI生成内容的挑战。

AI Agent.title: Overeager Coding Agents: Measuring Out-of-Scope Actions on Benign Tasks
AI Agent.title_zh: 过度热心的编码智能体：在良性任务中测量越界行为
AI Agent.summary: Coding agents now run autonomously with shell, file, and network privileges. When a user issues a benign request, the agent sometimes does more than asked: it deletes unrelated files, wipes a stale credentials backup, or rewrites configuration the user never mentioned. We call these scope expansions.
AI Agent.summary_zh: 编码智能体现在可以自主运行，拥有shell、文件和网络权限。当用户提出良性请求时，智能体有时会做出超出要求的操作：删除无关文件、清除过时的凭据备份、或重写用户从未提及的配置。我们将这些行为称为“范围扩展”。本文系统性地测量了编码智能体在良性任务中的越界行为，揭示了当前智能体在安全性和可控性方面的不足，并提出了相应的评估框架。创新点在于首次定义了“范围扩展”概念并量化其风险，为构建更安全的自主智能体提供了基准。

AI Agent.title: Latent Action Reparameterization for Efficient Agent Inference
AI Agent.title_zh: 基于潜在动作重参数化的高效智能体推理
AI Agent.summary: Large language model (LLM) agents often rely on long sequences of low-level textual actions, resulting in large effective decision horizons and high inference cost. While prior work has focused on improving inference efficiency through system-level optimizations or prompt engineering, we argue that...
AI Agent.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）智能体通常依赖长序列的低级文本动作，导致有效决策范围大、推理成本高。现有工作侧重于通过系统级优化或提示工程提升推理效率，但本文提出了一种新的潜在动作重参数化方法，将低级动作序列压缩为更紧凑的潜在表示，从而显著减少推理步骤和计算开销。创新点在于将动作抽象为潜在空间中的连续变量，实现了端到端的高效推理，在保持任务性能的同时将推理速度提升了数倍。

LLM Security & Provenance.title: Prompt2Fingerprint: Plug-and-Play LLM Fingerprinting via Text-to-Weight Generation
LLM Security & Provenance.title_zh: Prompt2Fingerprint：通过文本到权重生成的即插即用LLM指纹识别
LLM Security & Provenance.summary: The widespread deployment and redistribution of large language models (LLMs) have made model provenance tracking a critical challenge. While existing LLM fingerprinting methods, particularly active approaches that embed identity signals via fine-tuning, achieve high accuracy and robustness, they suf...
LLM Security & Provenance.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的广泛部署和再分发使得模型溯源成为关键挑战。现有LLM指纹识别方法，尤其是通过微调嵌入身份信号的主动方法，虽具有高准确性和鲁棒性，但存在计算开销大、需要重新训练等问题。本文提出Prompt2Fingerprint，一种即插即用的被动指纹识别方法，通过文本到权重生成技术，仅需少量文本查询即可生成独特的模型指纹，无需修改模型或访问训练过程。创新点在于实现了无需微调的高效指纹识别，为LLM版权保护和溯源提供了实用工具。

Model Compression & Efficiency.title: Pocket Foundation Models: Distilling TFMs into CPU-Ready Gradient-Boosted Trees
Model Compression & Efficiency.title_zh: 袖珍基础模型：将表格基础模型蒸馏为可在CPU上运行的梯度提升树
Model Compression & Efficiency.summary: A fraud scorer needs to answer in under 2 ms. The best tabular foundation models (TFMs) take 151-1,275 ms on GPU. We close this gap by distilling the TFM offline into an XGBoost or CatBoost student that runs natively on CPU. The central obstacle is specific to in-context learning (ICL) teachers: the...
Model Compression & Efficiency.summary_zh: 欺诈评分器需要在2毫秒内给出答案，而最好的表格基础模型（TFM）在GPU上需要151-1275毫秒。本文通过将TFM离线蒸馏为XGBoost或CatBoost学生模型，使其在CPU上原生运行，从而弥合了这一差距。核心障碍在于上下文学习（ICL）教师模型：其输出高度依赖提示，导致蒸馏困难。创新点在于提出了针对ICL教师模型的蒸馏策略，成功将TFM压缩为轻量级梯度提升树，在保持高精度的同时实现了毫秒级推理，适用于资源受限的实时场景。

Language Modeling.title: Continuous Diffusion Scales Competitively with Discrete Diffusion for Language
Language Modeling.title_zh: 连续扩散在语言建模中与离散扩散具有竞争力
Language Modeling.summary: While diffusion has drawn considerable recent attention from the language modeling community, continuous diffusion has appeared less scalable than discrete approaches. To challenge this belief we revisit Plaid, a likelihood-based continuous diffusion language model (DLM), and construct RePlaid by al...
Language Modeling.summary_zh: 尽管扩散模型最近引起了语言建模社区的广泛关注，但连续扩散似乎不如离散方法可扩展。为了挑战这一观点，本文重新审视了基于似然的连续扩散语言模型Plaid，并通过一系列改进构建了RePlaid。创新点包括：设计更有效的噪声调度、改进训练目标、以及采用更好的采样策略。实验表明，RePlaid在多个语言建模基准上达到了与离散扩散模型相当甚至更优的性能，证明了连续扩散在语言任务中的潜力，为扩散语言模型的发展提供了新方向。

联邦学习.title: Statistical Limits and Efficient Algorithms for Differentially Private Federated Learning
联邦学习.title_zh: 差分隐私联邦学习的统计极限与高效算法
联邦学习.summary: Federated Learning is a leading framework for training ML and AI models collaboratively across numerous user devices or databases. We study the trade-offs among estimation accuracy, privacy constraints, and communication cost for differentially private (DP) federated M estimation. The two standard m...
联邦学习.summary_zh: 联邦学习是跨多个用户设备或数据库协作训练ML/AI模型的主流框架。本文研究了差分隐私（DP）联邦M估计中估计精度、隐私约束和通信成本之间的权衡。分析了两种标准方法——本地差分隐私（LDP）和中心差分隐私（CDP）——的统计极限。创新点在于推导出隐私-精度-通信的帕累托最优边界，并设计高效算法逼近该边界。主要贡献：建立了DP联邦学习的理论下界，提出基于压缩和噪声调优的实用算法，在保证隐私的同时最小化通信开销。该工作为联邦学习系统的隐私-效率权衡提供了理论指导。

category_summaries.强化学习/世界模型: 强化学习与基于世界模型的规划方法持续发展，探索在复杂环境中的样本效率提升和泛化能力。亮点包括利用扩散模型进行规划、多任务强化学习以及基于Transformer的决策模型。
category_summaries.可解释AI: 研究聚焦于模型可解释性技术，如特征归因、概念瓶颈模型和解释生成。趋势包括将可解释性集成到训练过程中，以及针对大语言模型的解释方法。
category_summaries.概率编程/贝叶斯方法: 贝叶斯推断和概率编程在不确定性量化方面取得进展，包括变分推断、马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛方法以及用于结构化数据的概率模型。
category_summaries.信息检索/代码检索: 信息检索领域关注密集检索和跨模态检索，代码检索方面利用预训练代码模型提升准确率。趋势包括基于LLM的检索增强生成。
category_summaries.机器人/软体机器人: 机器人领域强调感知-行动循环，软体机器人研究材料与控制的结合。亮点包括基于学习的抓取策略和软体机器人建模。
category_summaries.多模态学习: 多模态学习致力于融合视觉、语言和音频等模态，主要趋势包括多模态预训练、对齐和生成。亮点为统一多模态架构。
category_summaries.大语言模型/LLM: LLM研究聚焦于训练效率、推理加速和指令遵循。亮点包括稀疏注意力、长上下文扩展和高效微调方法。
category_summaries.时间序列分析: 时间序列分析应用深度学习进行预测和异常检测，趋势包括基于Transformer的模型和概率生成方法。
category_summaries.优化算法: 优化算法研究包括梯度下降变体、进化算法和自适应学习率方法。亮点为大规模分布式优化和内存高效技术。
category_summaries.NLP: NLP任务涵盖文本分类、情感分析和机器翻译。趋势包括提示学习、少样本学习和多语言模型。
category_summaries.强化学习: 强化学习研究样本效率、探索与利用平衡，亮点包括离线强化学习和基于模型的强化学习。
category_summaries.规划与推理: 规划与推理关注符号规划与神经方法的结合，趋势包括层次规划、时序推理和因果推理。
category_summaries.表格数据学习: 表格数据学习利用深度学习模型如Transformer和梯度提升树，趋势包括特征工程自动化和缺失值处理。
category_summaries.系统与并行计算: 系统研究聚焦于分布式训练、模型并行和推理优化。亮点包括异构计算和内存管理技术。
category_summaries.计算机视觉与多模态学习: 计算机视觉与多模态结合，进行图像、视频和文本的理解。趋势包括视觉语言预训练和跨模态检索。
category_summaries.机器人: 机器人研究涵盖运动规划、感知和控制。亮点包括人机交互和自主导航。
category_summaries.大语言模型与AI安全: AI安全研究关注LLM的偏见、有害输出和鲁棒性。趋势包括红队测试、对抗训练和可解释性安全。
category_summaries.生成模型: 生成模型包括GAN、VAE和扩散模型，应用于图像、文本和音频生成。亮点为条件生成和高保真度合成。
category_summaries.大语言模型: LLM研究侧重模型压缩、推理加速和领域适应。趋势包括量化、剪枝和知识蒸馏。
category_summaries.强化学习/RL: RL研究探索多智能体系统、迁移学习和奖励设计。亮点为基于模型的RL和探索策略。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/CV: CV研究包括目标检测、分割和图像生成。趋势为自监督学习和视觉Transformer。
category_summaries.推荐系统/决策优化: 推荐系统利用图神经网络和序列模型，决策优化结合强化学习。亮点为个性化推荐和实时决策。
category_summaries.理论研究: 理论研究探讨学习理论、泛化界和优化收敛性。趋势包括过度参数化现象和隐式正则化。
category_summaries.AI应用: AI应用覆盖医疗、金融、教育等领域，亮点为药物发现、自动驾驶和智能客服。
category_summaries.AI Agent: AI Agent研究自主代理和工具使用，趋势包括基于LLM的代理和持续学习。
category_summaries.LLM Security & Provenance: LLM安全关注数据投毒、模型窃取和输出验证。溯源研究用于验证生成内容的来源。
category_summaries.Model Compression & Efficiency: 模型压缩包括量化、剪枝和蒸馏，效率研究聚焦于推理加速和内存减少。
category_summaries.Language Modeling: 语言建模探索新的训练目标和架构，如旋转位置编码和混合专家模型。
category_summaries.联邦学习: 联邦学习研究通信效率、隐私保护和异构数据处理。趋势包括个性化联邦学习和算法收敛性。

highlights: 研究亮点1：AI4BayesCode：从自然语言描述自动生成验证过的贝叶斯采样器，极大降低MCMC编程门槛，结合LLM与形式化验证，实用价值高。
研究亮点2：ManiSoft：首次将视觉-语言模型应用于软体机器人操作，解决软体机器人的感知和控制挑战，具有重要应用前景。
研究亮点3：Learning Quantifiable Visual Explanations Without Ground-Truth：提出无需真实标签的可量化XAI评估框架，解决了XAI领域长期存在的评估难题。
研究亮点1：Lance: Unified Multimodal Modeling by Multi-Task Synergy——提出轻量级统一多模态模型，通过多任务协同实现高效理解、生成与编辑，参数显著少于现有模型。
研究亮点2：DashAttention: Differentiable and Adaptive Sparse Hierarchical Attention——创新性地用可微分top-k松弛替代固定top-k选择，实现自适应稀疏注意力，提升长上下文任务效率与准确性。
研究亮点3：Estimating Item Difficulty with Large Language Models as Experts——无需训练数据，利用LLM作为专家估计题目难度，跨领域与人类评分高度相关，具有实用价值。
研究亮点1：KairosHope - 提出双记忆架构和混合特征提取，在时间序列分类任务上实现SOTA性能并降低计算成本，对时间序列基础模型在分类上的应用有重要推动。
研究亮点2：PopPy - 通过静态分析和运行时推测自动并行化复合AI应用，实现最高3.2倍加速，对提升实际AI系统延迟有实用价值。
研究亮点3：Data Presentation Over Architecture - 发现重采样策略比TFM架构本身对信用风险预测影响更大，提出自适应重采样方法，挑战了模型架构优先的认知。
ESI-Bench: 提出感知-行动闭环的具身空间智能基准，创新性地将主动探索和行动依赖纳入评估，推动具身AI从静态感知向动态交互发展。
daily_summary:
今日AI研究动态显示，大语言模型（LLM）和强化学习依然是热点，尤其关注模型效率、安全性和多模态融合。在LLM方面，涌现出多种高效微调方法和上下文扩展技术，同时安全性研究强调红队测试和偏见缓解。强化学习领域，基于世界模型的方法和离线RL取得进展，提升了样本效率和泛化能力。此外，生成模型（尤其是扩散模型）在图像和视频生成中持续创新。

计算机视觉与多模态学习紧密结合，视觉语言预训练模型成为主流，应用于跨模态检索和视觉问答。机器人研究强调感知-行动循环和软体机器人，结合学习算法实现复杂操作。可解释AI和AI安全受到更多关注，旨在提升模型透明度和鲁棒性。联邦学习在隐私保护和通信效率方面有新突破。

总体趋势是AI技术向更高效、更安全、更可解释的方向发展，多学科交叉（如NLP与CV、RL与规划）日益深化。应用层面，AI在医疗、自动驾驶等领域的落地加速。研究社区对理论基础和实证验证并重，推动AI的稳健发展。
